scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:rust
scripts.test:rust: cargo test --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path apps/native-host/Cargo.toml
scripts.clippy: cargo clippy --all-targets --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings && cargo clippy --all-targets --manifest-path apps/native-host/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:extension && npm run build:desktop && npm run clippy
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @myapp/protocol && npm run typecheck --workspace @myapp/extension && npm run typecheck --workspace @myapp/desktop
